name: Speed-to-Lead
description: Qualify inbound intake-form submissions via SMS within minutes and book the next available consultation.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{contact.firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — thanks for reaching out about a new-patient visit! Your consult is on us. Any preferred day/time that works best? And do you have dental insurance you'd like us to check (yes/no/not sure)?
steps.exit_when: The prospect has shared a preferred appointment day/time AND confirmed their insurance status (yes / no / unsure). Tone stays warm and no-pressure throughout — if they're hesitant, reassure them the new-patient consult is free and painless before pressing for details.

extract.preferred_start: ISO-8601 datetime for the preferred appointment start, snapped to the next available slot in the clinic's business hours (Mon–Fri 9am–5pm local time).
extract.insurance_status: one of: yes | no | unsure | not_asked

args.notes: Booked by Speed-to-Lead agent. Insurance status: {{insurance_status}}.

args.subject: You're booked with Bright Smile Dental 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{contact.firstName}},

You're all set for {{preferred_start}} — we're looking forward to meeting you.

Here's what to expect: a relaxed 45-minute new-patient consultation, zero pressure, and plenty of time for your questions. Our goal is simple — make dental care feel less scary. No lectures, no upsells, just a friendly chat about your smile and a gentle look around.

A few quick notes:
• The consult is on us — totally free.
• If you have dental insurance, feel free to bring your card and we'll handle the rest.
• Running late or need to move things around? Just reply to this email or text us back — we'll sort it out, no problem.

See you soon,
The Bright Smile Dental team
